title: SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION - 211info
text: UNITED STATES SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with information about Medicare, Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI), Supplemental Security Income (SSI), retirement benefits, survivors insurance, fraud reporting, and Social Security cards. Website provides addresses, hours of operation, and directions to local Social Security offices and other agencies that may be able to help with Social Security issues. A national call center is available for those who need information beyond what is available online and through automated telephone services. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 4am-4pm (800) 772-1213 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 772-1213 TTY/TTD (800) 325-0778 Fraud Hotline (800) 269-0271 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to apply online. To find a local office, use the online locator tool. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Medicare Social Security Disability Insurance Social Security Fraud Reporting Social Security Numbers Social Security Retirement Benefits SSI Survivors Insurance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - EXTRA HELP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
